capture_notes: Rendered through the REAL Command Center UI (production build via vite preview) against deterministic seeded fixtures built from the genuine PUBLIC-SPINE-DEMO-LOOP-001 Mission Receipt. Backend API calls are intercepted (no live backend); the demo receipt data is real. These are demo, fixture-backed screenshots — NOT full-stack production screenshots.
regenerate: Screenshots are shipped as deterministic, fixture-backed captures. The regeneration toolchain (Playwright + Command Center build) lives in the private Aurion repository and is not part of this public export.

screenshots.title: Command Center shell (Mission Control cockpit)
screenshots.caption: Aurion Command Center home cockpit (/mission-control) showing the public spine demo receipt, system readiness, approvals, and recommended next step.

screenshots.title: Mission Receipts list
screenshots.caption: Read-only Mission Receipts list showing the Public Spine Demo Loop 001 receipt (Governed Mission, Dry Run, Cost Allowed, COMPLETED).

screenshots.title: Public spine demo receipt detail
screenshots.caption: Detail view of the public spine demo Mission Receipt: status, receipt classification (dry run), and cost-governance evidence (decision: allowed, estimates, stop conditions).

screenshots.title: Demo governance evidence (permissions / audit / decision trace)
screenshots.caption: Governance evidence on the demo receipt: AuditLedger refs, BlackBox decision-trace ref, and honestly-labelled unavailable artifact refs (missing data shown as unavailable, never fake-green).

screenshots.title: Alpha mission-control status surface
screenshots.caption: Mission Control status cockpit showing honest readiness: no system checks run yet, external models require approval, demo receipt as governed proof — unavailable states shown honestly.
